notes: 12 fixed tasks spanning the archetypes that separated providers in prior evals: embedded text, vintage/retro, style fusion, dense concept, photoreal, mascot/character, format discipline. Prompts stay under 150 words by design (a provider that needs shorter prompts than the task allows loses fidelity points honestly).

tasks.prompt: Vintage national-park style badge reading 'TRAIL CREW' in bold serif arc, 'EST. 1974' beneath. A pine tree and crossed shovels center. Muted 3-color palette: forest green, cream, rust. Format: square 1:1, centered, isolated graphic on plain background.

Hand-lettered chalkboard cafe menu titled 'DAILY ROAST' listing exactly four items: Espresso 3, Flat White 4.5, Cold Brew 5, Filter 4. Chalk texture, ornamental flourishes, one coffee cup sketch. Format: vertical poster.

Minimal streetwear graphic: the word 'HARMONY' in clean geometric sans-serif stacked above its Japanese translation 調和 in brush style. Black ink on off-white. Format: square, centered, isolated graphic.
1930s California fruit-crate label: sun rising over orange groves, art-deco border, saturated lithograph palette, aged paper texture. No text. Format: square 1:1.

Mid-century travel poster for a Mars colony: flat geometric shapes, limited palette of coral, teal, sand, off-white, grainy screenprint texture, stylized rocket and dome habitats. No text. Format: vertical poster.

A city skyline rendered as a traditional Japanese woodblock print: flat color planes, visible baren texture, indigo-dominant palette with vermilion accents, stylized wave clouds. No modern typography, no photographic elements. Format: horizontal landscape.

A single detailed illustration of a lighthouse whose beam is made of migrating birds, over a sea of open books with whale tails of ink breaching between pages. Dusk palette, engraving-influenced linework, coherent single light source. Format: square.

Studio product photograph of a matte ceramic pour-over coffee set on pale oak, softbox lighting from upper left, shallow depth of field, neutral gray seamless background, subtle film grain. Format: horizontal.

Photorealistic portrait of a golden retriever wearing a navy fisherman's beanie, seated in warm window light, visible individual fur strands, natural catchlights in the eyes, plain warm-gray backdrop. Format: square, centered.

Friendly robot barista mascot: rounded chrome body, single expressive LED eye, holding a steaming cup, thick uniform outlines, flat cel shading, three-quarter view. White background. Format: square, centered, isolated graphic.

16-bit pixel art scene: a night market street with glowing lantern stalls, rain-slick cobblestones reflecting neon, one cat on a rooftop. Strict pixel grid, limited 16-color palette, no anti-aliasing. Format: square.

Minimal line-art logo of a mountain inside a circle, single-weight black stroke on white, generous negative space. Format: square 1:1, centered, isolated graphic — the circle must not touch the canvas edge.
